name: PolicyRecommendation
description: A USCIRF policy recommendation addressed to the U.S. President, Secretary of State, or Congress regarding international religious freedom.

report_year.description: Year of the annual report containing this recommendation.

enum: U.S. Ambassador-at-Large for International Religious Freedom

country.description: Country to which this recommendation pertains, if country-specific.

recommendation_text.description: Full text of the policy recommendation.

rationale.description: Explanation of the basis and rationale for the recommendation.

related_violations.description: Religious freedom violations that motivate this recommendation.
